title: Functions, methods, and lambdas should not have too many parameters
description: Methods and functions with excessive parameters may indicate a design issue. It is recommended to have no more than 5 parameters.
message: This function, method or lambda has too many parameters.

remediation.func: Refactor code to reduce the number of parameters

recommendation: Refactor code to reduce the number of parameters

noncompliant.code: def add_numbers(a, b, c, d, e, f): return a + b + c + d + e + f

compliant.code: def add_numbers(a, b, c, d): return a + b + c + d

why_is_this_an_issue: Excessive parameters may lead to increased complexity and reduced maintainability.
how_to_fix: Refactor code to reduce the number of parameters.

metadata.title: Functions, methods, and lambdas should not have too many parameters
